title: Examination of Whitlow

sections.body:
I was already ’spoken to’. I had nothing more to lose; killing her wouldn’t reinstate me. I saw someone skulking near the main generator after dinner, close to the tech workshop, but my eyes were tired from the whiteout glare.

Filed in a fair hand; trust it not overmuch. One of the detained souls lies outright, another lies by omission, and a third speaketh true in so crooked a manner that truth itself seems perjured.

There is a seam in this account where another hand hath tugged at it. The desk-note beneath it read only: “keep apart from the louder papers.”

subtitle: Desk mark: doubtful. The same mark is set upon papers later proved sound.
